description: A timestamped occurrence in a governance process corresponding to a durable artifact.
title: Governance Event

@id.description: An Internationalized Resource Identifier (IRI). May be a full IRI or a compact IRI (CURIE) resolved by the JSON-LD context.

artifact.description: The durable source document associated with this event.
artifact.title: Artifact

episode.description: The governance episode this event belongs to.
episode.title: Episode

governanceEventType.description: The governance function this event performs.
governanceEventType.title: Governance Event Type

partners.description: The institutional actors involved in this event.
partners.title: Partners

items.description: An Internationalized Resource Identifier (IRI). May be a full IRI or a compact IRI (CURIE) resolved by the JSON-LD context.

timestamp.description: The date or datetime on which this event occurred.
timestamp.title: Timestamp
